questions.text: What is the primary purpose of analyzing a cyber attack after it occurs?
options: To completely erase the infected hard drives
To identify vulnerabilities, understand the attack vector, and prevent future incidents
To retaliate against the attacker using offensive tools
To automatically generate new passwords for all users
questions.answer: To identify vulnerabilities, understand the attack vector, and prevent future incidents

questions.text: Which infiltration method relies heavily on manipulating human psychology rather than technical hacking?
In cybersecurity terminology, what is an 'exploit'?
options: A security protocol used to encrypt data
A piece of software or sequence of commands that takes advantage of a bug or vulnerability
A hardware device used to block unauthorized traffic
The process of backing up data securely
questions.answer: A piece of software or sequence of commands that takes advantage of a bug or vulnerability

questions.text: Why is the cybersecurity landscape considered to be constantly evolving?
options: Because computers naturally degrade over time
Because attackers continually develop new methods as new technologies and defenses are introduced
Because cybersecurity laws change every single day
Because hardware manufacturers force mandatory updates
questions.answer: Because attackers continually develop new methods as new technologies and defenses are introduced
